transcript: how to make spicy garlic honey chicken happy one year anniversary of me on tiktok this is my first ever viral recipe honestly a big thank you for all the love and support i love you guys cheers cut chicken into bite-sized pieces salt and pepper garlic powder cornstarch rice flour egg soda water mix together set it aside for 10 minutes to celebrate i also made some look at that merch super cute these are limited edition limited quantities they are on sale starting today link is in my bio fry the chicken for four to five minutes until crispy and golden brown optional but highly recommended double fry for the extra crispy korean red chili paste soy sauce minced garlic honey garlic, honey, mixed together, sesame seeds, saute on high heat for one minute. Look at that.
